name: morse
description: Maximum signal compression. Each section reduced to its essential claim in the fewest possible words. The essay as pure signal, no carrier wave.
register: Declarative sentences only. No metaphor. No scene-setting. Just the claims and the evidence.
rules: Remove all narrative (Jack Jack, the walk, the streetlights)
Keep only factual claims, citations, and the logical argument connecting them
The Hofstadter unit stays named exactly
Each section should be 2-4 sentences maximum
This is the absolute compression limit test -- what survives when everything else is stripped
The coda is one sentence: the thesis
Total output should be under 500 words
